summary: Tested 3 corrections for APS application: (1) Gantt tooltip bug fix - tooltip now follows cursor instead of being fixed on right side, (2) Scheduling page now has 2 strategies (ASAP/JIT) instead of 3 modes, (3) Diagnostic page shows scheduling strategy in 'Paramètres' tab. All features verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 corrections verified: Gantt tooltip follows cursor, Scheduling page has 2 strategies (ASAP/JIT), Diagnostic shows strategy. JIT scenarios may return INFEASIBLE if due_dates are too tight.

gantt_tooltip_bug_fix.description: Tooltip follows cursor instead of being fixed on right side
gantt_tooltip_bug_fix.implementation: tooltipPosition state with onMouseMove event in GanttInteractive.js
gantt_tooltip_bug_fix.test_result: Tooltip moves with cursor (15px distance from mouse)

scheduling_strategies.description: Replaced 3 modes with 2 strategies (ASAP and JIT)

diagnostic_strategy_display.description: Diagnostic page 'Paramètres' tab shows scheduling strategy used
diagnostic_strategy_display.displays: Au plus tôt or Au plus tard with icon and explanation

jit_mode_constraints.description: JIT mode respects due_date constraints on last operation of each OF
jit_mode_constraints.note: May return INFEASIBLE if due_dates are too tight for material constraints
jit_mode_constraints.status: VERIFIED (logic correct, may be INFEASIBLE with tight constraints)

api_endpoints_tested.notes: Returns task data for Gantt display
